operator: a NOT BETWEEN b AND c
sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, url String, created_at DateTime);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, url, created_at) VALUES (1, 'https://clickhouse.com', now());
INSERT INTO test_table (id, url, created_at) VALUES (2, 'http://example.com', now());
SELECT base64URLEncode(url) FROM test_table WHERE id NOT BETWEEN 1 AND (SELECT MAX(id) FROM test_table) AND created_at > now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY;
SELECT id, base64URLEncode(url) AS encoded_url FROM test_table WHERE NOT (created_at BETWEEN (now() - INTERVAL 1 WEEK) AND (now())) GROUP BY id HAVING encoded_url IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT url, base64URLEncode(url) AS encoded_url FROM test_table WHERE base64URLEncode(url) NOT BETWEEN 'a' AND 'z') AS subquery GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(*) > 0;
SELECT id, base64URLEncode(url) FROM test_table WHERE (id NOT BETWEEN 1 AND 2) OR (base64URLEncode(url) = 'aW1wbGVtZW50YmF0aW9uPQo=') ORDER BY id DESC;
SELECT url FROM test_table WHERE id NOT BETWEEN 2 AND 3 AND url != '';
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT * FROM test_table;
INSERT INTO temp_table (id, url, created_at) SELECT id, base64URLEncode(url), created_at FROM test_table WHERE url NOT LIKE '%.com';
